name: Mountain Pose
cues: Feet hip-width, crown lifts, soft gaze forward.

name: Standing Forward Fold
cues: Hinge from hips, soft knees, let the head hang.

name: Half Lift
cues: Long spine, hands to shins or blocks.

name: Low Lunge
cues: Back knee down, front knee stacked over ankle.

name: High Lunge
cues: Back heel lifted, hips square, torso upright.

name: Warrior I
cues: Back foot angled, hips square forward, arms reach up.

name: Warrior II
cues: Front knee tracks toes, arms extend, gaze over front hand.

name: Warrior III
cues: Hips level, standing leg strong, torso parallel to floor.

name: Reverse Warrior
cues: Keep front knee bent, reach up and back without collapsing.

name: Extended Side Angle
cues: Front knee bent, long line from back heel to top hand.

name: Triangle Pose
cues: Straight legs, lengthen both sides of the waist.

name: Pyramid Pose
cues: Square hips, fold over front leg with long spine.

name: Wide-Legged Forward Fold
cues: Feet parallel, hinge from hips, support hands as needed.

name: Goddess Pose
cues: Wide stance, knees track toes, chest open.

name: Chair Pose
cues: Sit back into imaginary chair, weight in heels.

name: Tree Pose
cues: Foot above or below knee, hips level, soft gaze.

name: Eagle Pose
cues: Wrap legs and arms, sit the hips back.

name: Dancer Pose
cues: Kick foot into hand, lift chest, keep standing knee soft.

name: Half Moon
cues: Stack hips, open chest, gaze can stay down for balance.

name: Standing Split
cues: Hips square as possible, top leg lifts without collapsing.

name: Downward-Facing Dog
cues: Press floor away, long spine, heels toward mat.

name: Upward-Facing Dog
cues: Thighs lift, shoulders over wrists, open the chest.

name: Cobra Pose
cues: Elbows soft, press pubic bone down, lift through sternum.

name: Locust Pose
cues: Lift chest and legs, keep neck long.

name: Bow Pose
cues: Kick feet into hands, lift thighs and chest evenly.

name: Camel Pose
cues: Hips over knees, support lower back, open chest.

name: Bridge Pose
cues: Press feet down, lift hips, keep knees tracking forward.

name: Wheel Pose
cues: Press evenly through hands and feet, open chest.

name: Sphinx Pose
cues: Forearms grounded, lengthen through crown.

name: Plank Pose
cues: Shoulders over wrists, body in one long line.

name: Four-Limbed Staff
cues: Elbows hug in, lower halfway, shoulders above elbows.

name: Side Plank
cues: Stack or stagger feet, lift hips, open chest.

name: Dolphin Pose
cues: Forearms grounded, hips high, neck soft.

name: Dolphin Plank
cues: Forearms down, body long like plank.

name: Crow Pose
cues: Knees to upper arms, gaze forward, round the back.

name: Side Crow
cues: Twist first, then lean forward onto upper arms.

name: Headstand Prep
cues: Forearms frame the head, walk feet in, hips stack.

name: Supported Shoulderstand
cues: Support low back, keep neck soft, legs vertical.

name: Legs Up the Wall
cues: Hips close to wall, arms rest by sides.

name: Happy Baby
cues: Hold outer feet or ankles, sacrum grounded.

name: Supine Twist
cues: Both shoulders toward floor, breathe into the twist.

name: Knees to Chest
cues: Hug knees in, rock gently if helpful.

name: Dead Bug
cues: Lower opposite arm and leg while keeping low back grounded.

name: Boat Pose
cues: Lift chest, shins parallel or toes high, long spine.

name: Staff Pose
cues: Sit tall on sit bones, legs active, shoulders soft.

name: Seated Forward Fold
cues: Hinge from hips, keep length in the spine.

name: Head-to-Knee Pose
cues: Square torso over extended leg, soft fold.

name: Wide-Angle Seated Fold
cues: Sit tall first, then walk hands forward.

name: Bound Angle Pose
cues: Soles together, lengthen spine before folding.

name: Reclined Bound Angle
cues: Support knees with props if needed, soften belly.

name: Cow Face Pose
cues: Stack knees, find arm bind or use a strap.

name: Pigeon Pose
cues: Front shin angled to comfort, square hips, support with props.

name: Sleeping Pigeon
cues: Fold forward over front leg, breathe into the hip.

name: Lizard Pose
cues: Hands inside front foot, options for forearms or lift back knee.

name: Frog Pose
cues: Support with padding, ease knees wider gradually.

name: Fire Log Pose
cues: Stack shins carefully, keep ankles supported.

name: Garland Pose
cues: Heels down if possible, chest lifts, elbows press knees.

name: Hero Pose
cues: Sit between heels or on a block, keep knees comfortable.

name: Thunderbolt Pose
cues: Sit on heels, tall spine, hands on thighs.

name: Easy Seat
cues: Cross shins, elevate hips on a blanket if needed.

name: Half Lotus
cues: One foot to opposite thigh, keep both knees easeful.

name: Seated Twist
cues: Lengthen on inhale, twist on exhale, keep sit bones grounded.

name: Marichi's Pose A
cues: Hug bent knee, fold over straight leg with long spine.

name: Marichi's Pose C
cues: Bent knee as lever, twist toward bent leg.

name: Revolved Triangle
cues: Square hips, lengthen spine before revolving.

name: Revolved Lunge
cues: Hand to block or floor, twist from mid-back.

name: Revolved Chair
cues: Keep knees even, twist from the ribs.

name: Cat Pose
cues: Round the spine, tuck chin, press floor away.

name: Cow Pose
cues: Drop belly, lift sit bones and chest, soft neck.

name: Tabletop
cues: Shoulders over wrists, hips over knees, neutral spine.

name: Thread the Needle
cues: Slide one arm under the body, rest ear or shoulder.

name: Puppy Pose
cues: Hips over knees, walk hands forward, chest toward mat.

name: Child's Pose
cues: Knees together or wide, forehead rests, arms forward or by sides.

name: Extended Child's Pose
cues: Arms reach long, melt chest between thighs.

name: Corpse Pose
cues: Let the body be heavy, soft breath, no effort.

name: Constructive Rest
cues: Knees bent, feet on floor, arms rest comfortably.

name: Fish Pose
cues: Support under upper back as needed, open throat gently.

name: Supported Fish
cues: Bolster under mid-back, arms open, soft jaw.

name: Plow Pose
cues: Support back, keep neck free of pressure.

name: Ear Pressure Pose
cues: From plow, bend knees by ears if comfortable.

name: Handstand Prep at Wall
cues: Hands under shoulders, kick lightly, keep gaze between hands.

name: Forearm Stand Prep
cues: Forearms parallel, walk feet in, hips stack over shoulders.

name: Twisted Lizard
cues: Front knee wide, twist toward bent knee.

name: Low Lunge Twist
cues: Back knee down, hand inside or outside front foot.

name: Crescent Lunge
cues: Back heel lifted, hips square, arms reach or cactus.

name: Side Lunge
cues: Shift weight side to side, keep grounded foot active.

name: Gate Pose
cues: Kneel on one knee, extend other leg, side bend over long leg.

name: Kneeling Side Stretch
cues: Reach top arm overhead, keep bottom hip grounded.

name: Figure Four
cues: Ankle over opposite thigh, flex foot, sit or recline.

name: Reclined Figure Four
cues: Thread hands behind thigh, keep sacrum heavy.

name: Supine Hamstring Stretch
cues: Use a strap around the foot, keep both hips grounded.

name: Supine Straddle Stretch
cues: Open legs wide with straps or hands, soft low back.

name: Windshield Wipers
cues: Knees bent, drop both knees side to side slowly.

name: Banana Pose
cues: Walk heels and hands to one side, keep both shoulders down.

name: Supported Bridge
cues: Block under sacrum, legs extended or bent.

name: Seated Chair Twist
cues: Sit tall on a chair, twist using the backrest for support.

name: Wall Down Dog
cues: Hands on wall, walk feet back, long spine.

name: Wall-Supported Warrior II
cues: Back heel or hips near wall for feedback.

name: Block Bridge
cues: Squeeze block between thighs, lift hips evenly.

name: Interlaced Shoulder Opener
cues: Interlace fingers behind back, lift arms as chest opens.

name: Eagle Arms
cues: Wrap arms, lift elbows, soften between shoulder blades.

name: Cow Face Arms
cues: Use a strap between hands if bind is unavailable.

name: Ankle to Knee
cues: Stack ankle over knee carefully, fold forward if easeful.

name: Lizard on Forearms
cues: Lower forearms if shoulders and hips allow.

name: Half Splits
cues: Hips over back knee, flex front foot, fold with long spine.

name: Splits Prep
cues: Use blocks under hands, ease front heel and back knee apart.

name: Camel Hands to Hips
cues: Hands support low back, lift sternum without forcing neck.

name: Locust with Arms Back
cues: Interlace hands behind back as chest lifts.

name: Three-Legged Dog
cues: Lift one leg, keep hips level, press strongly through hands.

name: Knee-Down Dog
cues: Knees under hips, walk hands forward for a gentler stretch.

name: Prayer Squat
cues: Heels on wedge or rolled mat if needed, palms together.

name: Seated Cat-Cow
cues: Hands on knees, round and arch the spine with the breath.

name: Seated Neck Release
cues: Ear toward shoulder, no forcing, switch sides slowly.

name: Wrist Circles
cues: Gentle circles both directions before weight-bearing.

name: Ankle Circles
cues: Point and flex, then circle slowly.

name: Sun Salutation A Cue Sheet
cues: Mountain, fold, half-lift, plank, chaturanga, up-dog, down-dog, return.

name: Sun Salutation B Cue Sheet
cues: Chair, fold, and Warrior I between vinyasa transitions.
